data.title: G8 Education Announces Director’s Interest Change
data.description:
G8 Education Limited ( (AU:GEM) ) has provided an update.

G8 Education Limited has announced a change in the director’s interest, specifically involving Stephen Heath. The change, effective from September 16, 2025, involves an acquisition of 122,000 securities through Heath Nominees (Aust) Pty Ltd, with a total consideration of $100,003.91. This adjustment in director’s interest, executed through an on-market trade, reflects ongoing investment activities within the company and may have implications for its governance and stakeholder engagement.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:GEM) stock is a Hold with a A$0.90 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on G8 Education Limited stock, see the AU:GEM Stock Forecast page.

More about G8 Education Limited

G8 Education Limited operates in the education sector, focusing on providing early childhood education services. The company manages a network of childcare centers across Australia, catering to the needs of families seeking quality early learning and care for their children.

Average Trading Volume: 4,114,118

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: A$648.1M

data.title: Antipa Minerals Schedules AGM and Continues Exploration Success
data.description:
Antipa Minerals Limited ( (AU:AZY) ) has provided an announcement.

Antipa Minerals Limited has announced its upcoming Annual General Meeting (AGM) scheduled for November 25, 2025, with director nominations closing on October 1, 2025. The company continues to focus on its exploration success at the Minyari Dome Gold-Copper precinct, aiming for substantial growth in its gold-copper resources and significant value creation for shareholders.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:AZY) stock is a Buy with a A$1.10 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Antipa Minerals Limited stock, see the AU:AZY Stock Forecast page.

More about Antipa Minerals Limited

Antipa Minerals Ltd is a leading mineral exploration company focused on discovering world-class gold-copper deposits in the Paterson Province of Western Australia. The company is advancing its exploration and development programs, particularly at its Minyari Project, which hosts significant mineral resources including gold, copper, silver, and cobalt.

data.title: Polaris Holdings Initiates KOKO HOTELS Brand Integration
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from Polaris Holdings Co., Ltd ( (JP:3010) ).

Polaris Holdings Co., Ltd. has commenced the integration of its hotel brand, KOKO HOTELS, with the Hotel Wing International and Tenza Hotel brands, following a management integration with Minacia Co., Ltd. The rebranding is scheduled to occur across various locations from September 2025 to April 2026. The company anticipates minimal impact on its consolidated financial results for the fiscal year ending March 2026, as these changes have already been included in the earnings forecast.

The most recent analyst rating on (JP:3010) stock is a Buy with a Yen235.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Polaris Holdings Co., Ltd stock, see the JP:3010 Stock Forecast page.

More about Polaris Holdings Co., Ltd

Polaris Holdings Co., Ltd. operates in the hospitality industry, primarily focusing on hotel management and branding. The company is known for its hotel brands, including KOKO HOTELS, and has recently integrated with Minacia Co., Ltd., expanding its market presence.

Average Trading Volume: 434,464

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: Yen49.59B

data.title: Shanxi Installation Group Announces Venue Change for Upcoming EGM
data.description:
Shanxi Installation Group Co., Ltd. Class H ( (HK:2520) ) has issued an announcement.

Shanxi Installation Group Co., Ltd., a joint stock company incorporated in China, has announced a change in the venue for its first extraordinary general meeting (EGM) scheduled for September 24, 2025. The meeting will now be held at Conference Room No. 2, Wyndham Grand, Shanxi Xiaohe New City, due to administrative reasons. All other details regarding the EGM, including the date, time, and agenda, remain unchanged, and shareholders who have already submitted proxy forms do not need to resubmit them.

data.title: Pioneer Lithium to Release Securities from Escrow
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from Pioneer Lithium Limited ( (AU:PLN) ).

Pioneer Lithium Limited announced the release of 15 million ordinary fully paid shares and a total of 22.75 million unlisted options from ASX-imposed escrow, effective 28 September 2025. This move could enhance the company’s liquidity and potentially attract more investor interest, impacting its market positioning positively.

Pioneer Lithium Limited operates in the mining industry, focusing on the exploration and development of lithium resources. The company is positioned to capitalize on the growing demand for lithium, a key component in battery technology, particularly for electric vehicles and renewable energy storage solutions.

data.title: Mercury NZ Announces Director Elections at 2025 Shareholders’ Meeting
data.description:
An announcement from Mercury NZ ( (MGHTF) ) is now available.

At Mercury NZ Limited’s 2025 Annual Shareholders’ Meeting, shareholders voted to re-elect Susan Peterson and Scott St John as directors and elected Rob Hamilton and Rachel Taulelei as new directors. The voting was conducted by a poll, with all resolutions receiving strong support from the shareholders, indicating confidence in the company’s leadership and strategic direction.

More about Mercury NZ

Mercury NZ Limited is a company that generates electricity from 100% renewable sources, including hydro, geothermal, and wind. It is also a retailer of electricity, gas, broadband, and mobile services. The company is listed on both the New Zealand Stock Exchange and the Australian Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol ‘MCY’, with the New Zealand Government holding a minimum 51% shareholding.

data.title: Bullish’s Q2 2025 Results and US Market Entry
data.description:
Bullish is an institutionally focused global digital asset platform that provides market infrastructure and information services, operating primarily in the digital assets sector with a unique global regulatory footprint.

In its second quarter of 2025 earnings report, Bullish announced a significant milestone with the acquisition of the New York DFS BitLicense, paving the way for its entry into the US market in the fourth quarter. The company reported digital asset sales of $58.6 billion and a net income of $108.3 million, marking a substantial turnaround from the previous year’s loss.

Key financial metrics for the quarter included an adjusted revenue of $57.0 million and an adjusted EBITDA of $8.1 million. The company also highlighted a 61.4% sequential growth in subscription, services, and other revenue, reaching $32.9 million. Bullish’s trading volume saw a notable increase to $179.6 billion, with an average daily volume of 1.974 billion. The company’s strategic achievements included securing high-profile partnerships and expanding its regulatory approvals globally.

Looking ahead, Bullish’s management has provided guidance for the third quarter of 2025, expecting adjusted revenue between $69.0 million and $76.0 million, and adjusted EBITDA ranging from $25.0 million to $28.0 million. The company is optimistic about its future growth trajectory, supported by its expanding product offerings and strategic market entries.
